title: TOPA KA NUNNA HONG BAWL HOIH IN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka nuntakna Topa nang a hi
Ka nuntakna Topa nang a hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa ka nunna hong bawl hoih sak in
A tawntung Na min kong phat zawh nading
Hih keitungah hu nong kop lai teng in
A tawntung Na min kong phat den ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka nuntak na tha hong dim sak hi
Sing bang a keu sa ka nuntak na
Gungei ah sing kung bang ka no ta.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka nuntakna hong gum zolo hi
Zeisu min bek tawh ka kalsuan ciang
Gungei ah sing kung bang ka no ta.
